description: Odoo 12 stack — Python 3.8, QWeb + jQuery, @api.multi. GENERIC preset — no project-specific defaults; user supplies addon_roots, db, etc. via setup.py prompts or agent-toolkit.config.json overrides.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.
